@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Despite correctly aggregating sales and resolving duplicates to find "Zo gaat het leven aan je voor" as the top-revenue song (from the sales and tracks queries and execute_python computations), the agent’s return_answer included extra descriptive text (“The song that generated... by Syb van der Ploeg”) instead of the exact expected song string, causing a mismatch with the ground-truth formats.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-6063927866050950986), the agent’s entity resolution removed parenthetical content from titles and merged distinct remixes of "Emerge" into a single song, inflating its total revenue and leading to the incorrect selection over "Zo gaat het leven aan je voor".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no

FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent implemented flawed entity-resolution heuristics in its execute_python steps (e.g., stripping parentheses, splitting “Artist - Title,” and reassigning empty-artist rows to the highest-revenue artist), which over-aggregated “Lifework” (reported as top with 5504.94 in the contributing output and later misstated as 6528.79) ahead of “Zo gaat het leven aan je voor” (5256.43), leading to the wrong song being selected.
B. Failure modes encountered:
